sections.heading: Every claim,checkable.
sections.text: Chapter V. ✦ VERIFIABLE Every claim, checkable. We publish our licenses, our clinicians' credentials, and our regulatory standing — so you can verify us before trusting us. No fake badges. Only what we can prove.
“Trust isn't a logo. It's a number you can verify, an authority you can call, a credential you can check. If a badge doesn't carry a verifiable trail, we don't display it.”

sections.heading: ✦ Verified credentials
sections.text: ✦ VERIFIED CREDENTIALS Every claim is independently checkable. ✚ Saudi MOH Licensed Facility Full medical facility license, renewed annually. License number available on request — please call 920024428. Issued by Saudi Ministry of Health ✪ RCSI Fellowship — Maxillofacial Dr. Hassan Nazzal holds Fellowship of the Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland — verifiable through RCSI registry. Issued by Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland VERIFY ↗ ✪ AAD Member since 2004 Dr. Marina Naddaf has held continuous AAD membership since 2004 — twenty-one years of professional standing. Issued by American Academy of Dermatology VERIFY ↗ ✦ SFDA-registered devices Every laser, ultrasound, RF, and aesthetic device on our floors is SFDA-registered. Issued by Saudi Food & Drug Authority ❋ PDPL-compliant data Patient data stored on Saudi sovereign infrastructure. No cross-border transfers without explicit consent. Issued by SDAIA ✱ Tabby + Tamara — SAMA-licensed BNPL Instalments up to SAR 10,000 via Tabby and Tamara — both SAMA-licensed under the consumer-protection cap. Issued by Saudi Central Bank (SAMA)
Issued by Saudi Ministry of Health
Issued by Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland VERIFY ↗
